drivers.notes: 17 × 45 mm planar ribbon — part of the Dali Hybrid Tweeter module

drivers.material: Clarity Cone paper and wood-fibre, SMC motor
Clarity Cone paper and wood-fibre, SMC motor

description.en: The pinnacle of the Rubikore range — a 2½+½-way floorstander with Dali's Hybrid Tweeter module (29 mm soft dome plus 17 × 45 mm planar ribbon) feeding three 6½″ Clarity Cone drivers with SMC motors. Bi-wire/bi-amp terminals, bass-reflex tuned to 33 Hz, 112 dB max SPL and a 40–250 W amp window for full-range duty in medium-to-large rooms.
description.es: El tope de la línea Rubikore — un floorstander de 2½+½ vías con el módulo Hybrid Tweeter de Dali (domo suave de 29 mm más cinta plana de 17 × 45 mm) alimentando tres drivers Clarity Cone de 6½″ con motor SMC. Terminales bi-wire/bi-amp, bass-reflex sintonizado a 33 Hz, 112 dB SPL máx. y un rango de amp de 40–250 W para uso full-range en salas medianas a grandes.
